zh.Constantine, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾康斯坦丁
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Tremayne於1314年出生在英國可瓦爾康斯坦丁時，他的父親Peter II Tremayne32歲，母親Honour Trevartea18歲。他於1304年之前與Mary Erney在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1354年享年40歲。

zh-hans.Constantine, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾康斯坦丁
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Tremayne于1314年出生在英国可瓦爾康斯坦丁时，他的父亲Peter II Tremayne32岁，母亲Honour Trevartea18岁。他于1304年之前与Mary Erney在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1354年享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tremayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Tremaine
meanings: Cornish: habitational name from one or more places in Cornwall named Tremayne (Saint Columb Major, Crowan, Saint Martin in Meneage), Tremaine, or Tremain (Pelynt). The placenames all derive from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + men ‘stone’, with the exception of Tremaine, which may have menegh, plural of manach ‘monk’, as the final element.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Tremayne was born in 1314, in Constantine, Cornwall, England, his father, Peter II Tremayne, was 32 and his mother, Honour Trevartea, was 18. He married Mary Erney before 1304, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1354, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Tremayne est né en 1314, à Constantine, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Peter II Tremayne, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Honour Trevartea, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mary Erney avant 1304, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1354, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Tremayne 1314 in Constantine, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter II Tremayne 32 und seine Mutter Honour Trevartea 18. Er hat vor 1304 in England Mary Erney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1354 im Alter von 40 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Tremayne è nato il nel 1314 nel Constantine, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Peter II Tremayne, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Honour Trevartea, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Mary Erney prima del 1304, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1354, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Tremayneが1314年にイギリスコルンワルコンスタンティンで生まれた時，父Peter II Tremayneは32歳，母Honour Trevarteaは18歳であった。1304年以前にイギリスでMary Erneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1354年に40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Tremayne(이)가 1314년 영국 코른월 콘스탠틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter II Tremayne(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Honour Trevartea(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1304년 이전 영국에서 Mary Erney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1354년 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Constantine, Cornwall, England: Lann Gostentin, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Tremayne nasceu em 1314, em Constantine, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter II Tremayne, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Honour Trevartea, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Erney antes 1304, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1354, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Tremayne родился в 1314 г. в местности кунстантаин, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter II Tremayne было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Honour Trevartea, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Erney перед 1304 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1354 г. в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Tremayne nació en 1314, en Constantine, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter II Tremayne, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Honour Trevartea, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Mary Erney antes de 1304, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1354, a la edad de 40 años.
